author: barisdincer
description: Scan your vault for attachments that are no longer referenced and review them before moving them to trash. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Baris Dincer
manifest.description: Scan your vault for attachments that are no longer referenced and review them before moving them to trash.
manifest.name: VaultPrune - Unused Attachment Cleaner

name: VaultPrune - Unused Attachment Cleaner

releases.author: barisdincer
releases.description:
## Changes
- Remove direct textarea element.style assignments from settings UI.
- Keep textarea sizing controlled through CSS classes for Obsidian lint compatibility.

## Validation
- Built the plugin bundle with esbuild.
- Checked the diff with git diff --check.
- Verified no .style usage remains under src/.

releases.author: barisdincer
releases.description:
## Changes
- Detect Obsidian's configured attachment folder for new installations when a single global folder is available.
- Show a generic manual folder prompt when Obsidian uses note-relative attachment locations or does not expose a folder.
- Remove personal attachment folder examples from plugin settings and legacy prototype references.

## Validation
- Built the plugin bundle with esbuild.
- Checked the diff with git diff --check.
- Verified no personal z_ekler/path examples remain in plugin-facing files.

releases.author: barisdincer
releases.description:
## Changes
- Rework the unused attachment review modal with clearer explanatory text and readable summary stats.
- Increase thumbnail size in the candidate list and add click-to-open large previews for image/video candidates.
- Replace cramped Obsidian setting controls in the review modal with compact custom filter controls.
- Force compact settings textarea heights and normalize stored absolute vault paths when settings open.

## Validation
- Built the plugin bundle with esbuild.
- Checked the diff with git diff --check.

releases.author: barisdincer
releases.description:
## Changes
- Add compact settings layout with a direct scan button.
- Add attachment thumbnails/previews in the review modal.
- Add safe-listed files so known files can be ignored from future scans.
- Normalize absolute vault paths in folder/file settings.

## Validation
- Built the plugin bundle with esbuild.
- Checked the diff with git diff --check.

releases.author: barisdincer
releases.description:
Release 0.1.1

- Removes the restricted word from the plugin description for Obsidian Community directory checks.

releases.author: barisdincer
releases.description:
Initial release of VaultPrune - Unused Attachment Cleaner.

Highlights:
- Native Obsidian plugin scaffold
- Unused attachment scanning for Markdown and Canvas references
- Review modal with filtering, selection, and preview report
- Safe trash-based cleanup flow
